chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D - 735 of 2023 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge For non-prosecution 08.08.2023 Syed Israr Ahmed Shah, Advocate for petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the petitioner under instructions does not press the instant petition, which stands dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI
